text.title: vui-accessibility-inclusivity Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema for the artefact produced by the vui-accessibility-inclusivity methodology. Validator enforces required keys + per-field constraints.

example.note: Missing __faion_header__; single slice; fairness gap 20 pp (>10); prompt grade >8; transcript and non-voice fallback missing.

list.item: transcript_available or non_voice_fallback set to false.
